Barbie

"She's everything. He's just Ken."

6.9
2023MOVIEPG-13Released

Synopsis

Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

Tags

feminismsatirepatriarchysocial satirebased on toyfemale protagonistfish out of waterwomanhooddollfantasy worldmotherhoodexistentialismwoman directormisandrymother daughter relationship
